headline.method_label: YoY nowcast from public category proxies with month-to-date prorating

source_health.detail: Collected 9 retail food price observations from StatCan.
Apify run failed for all actors. sunny_eternity/loblaws-grocery-scraper: Maximum charged results must be greater than zero Reusing last successful APIFY timestamp for freshness gating.
Collected 1 fuel price observations from StatCan.

Collected 11 health/personal CPI proxies from StatCan CSV.
Collected 20 recreation/education CPI proxies from StatCan CSV.

notes: This is an experimental nowcast estimate and not an official CPI release.
Methodology v1.3.3: weighted category proxies with month-to-date YoY projection.
Confidence rubric: gate status + weighted coverage + anomaly rate + source diversity.
Model applies minimal smoothing with calibration guardrails to reduce tail errors while preserving real-time signal responsiveness.
Housing includes an asking-rent momentum overlay from Rentals.ca and is not survey-equivalent to transacted-rent CPI methods.
Coverage ratio is the share of the CPI basket with usable source data in this run.
Source diversity warning: single-source categories today: housing, transport, communication.
Dropped 12 points via day-over-day anomaly filter.
Deprecated fields retained for compatibility: headline.nowcast_mom_pct and headline.consensus_spread_yoy.
Calibrated YoY nowcast from raw 1.424% to 1.717% using transparent shrinkage diagnostics.
Official CPI YoY display uses one-decimal release-style rounding (2.3%).
Consensus YoY withheld due to quality guardrails: insufficient_high_conf_sources.
Forecast is withheld until sufficient live history accumulates.

omitted_components.rationale: Daily representative scraping remains noisy and high maintenance.
High SKU churn and promotion-driven volatility can distort daily proxies.
Regulated pricing cadence is less informative for daily nowcasting.

mapping_notes: communication is represented as a proxy mapped within broader official CPI components.
energy is tracked as a high-signal proxy across shelter and transport-related cost pressures.

apify_retry.reason: Apify run failed for all actors. sunny_eternity/loblaws-grocery-scraper: Maximum charged results must be greater than zero Reusing last successful APIFY timestamp for freshness gating.

notes: Calibration applies moderate shrinkage toward recent official trend when diversity is weak or anomaly pressure is elevated.
Early-stage metrics should be interpreted cautiously until live history depth increases.
